series_metadata.series_description: Includes treatment records and patient history. It contains all legal, administrative, treatment and other information relative to the entry, treatment and discharge of any inmate treated in the Department of Rehabilitation and Correction. It also contains most of the records listed in the Standard Medical Record Manual. It includes the contents of the Clinic Treatment Records.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: This file will be merged with inmate master file upon inmates release from custody. ten (10) years final release, maximum expiration of sentance, death, definite expiration, etc
